Additional to-do's / ideas:
- [x] artist detail page has the Data Overview & Data Entries tab. This was initially done as some extra information might be added (so extra tabs, for e.g. a map overview of their works). However, that never happened. Can you remove that section and just have the "# entries in database:" come straight underneath the biographical data?
- [x] can we for the city overview and museum overview page, instead of having all the painting cards have it more like table style such as in the query pages? There are simply too many entries to make it make sense. (e.g. the Rijksmuseum (museum 36) has 222 DB entries)
- [x] museum detail the Museum Website link is dark on the dark background in the jumbotron.
- [x] Make table pages sortable by clicking on column headers
- [ ] On entry detail page: hovering over the reliability number should give a help tooltip thingy with brief explanation of that value. 
- [ ] Optimize pages for mobile use (where possible)
- [ ] Optimize query pages UI (the query interface for example)
- [x] M463 (example) is a work with 2 artists. The attribution is shown weirdly in cards "M463: The garden of eden with the fall of man (c.1615) By: BRIL, Paulus & "/artists/89/">RUBENS, Peter Paul Painted in: Antwerp"
